Event: Summer Festival 2026
Event Date: 01/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: B52
Angery Bzzz Bow

When attacking, has a 25% chance of dealing 120% damage to a group of enemies. For the duration of the battle, the unit's damage, crit and physical armor piercing are increased by 30% for each enemy unit afflicted with sundering, decay or armor tearing effect. Stacks up to 10 times.

Once in a while, the unit silences 4 random enemy units for 4 sec. The silenced enemy units cannot use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set). The unit also sunders their armor. When their armor is sundered, the enemy units receive pure damage equal to 35% of their maximum health, and their physical and magic armor are reduced by 40% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 1 times. These enemy units also receive pure damage equal to 30% of their maximum health for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
